title: MRF is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: MRF is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Quality Control Engineer looking for your next big career move? MRF in Bengaluru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About MRF:
MRF is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Kaizen

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MRF!
